title: The Activation
description: The Grand Architect demands completion. A choice must be made.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: What didn't happen! That old lady was the master of the entire Guild! and also, she thinks she is your mother.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: My Mother died when I was a baby.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: I guess she didn't! and her staff was some kind of... I don't know, some kind of life suction device, only she did not expect to start sucking the life out of you but it did Vera! It did! We almost lost you!

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I was lost there for a minute, wasn't I?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: yes! But then Addie went all BEAR, did you she could do that? she went absolutely feral, and knocked the staff out of the Guildmaster's hands. You went flying, the Guildmaster went flying, Addie scared all those cultists, they'd never seen anything like her before! I tell you Vera, I haven't either!

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: How did we end up here?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Addie grabbed you, and the professor like you were nothing. I grabbed all the notes I could find bcause, you know, and I ran after. MOST of the cult guys ran away but there was one with a staff and he threw it at Addie and hit her dead in the shoulder!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Suddenly, the world comes into very sharp focus

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Where is Addie? Is she ok? I need to see her, right now!

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: The professor said I was to tell you to stay right.... aaand there she goes. WAIT UP!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You wander downstairs to your father's laboratory in the basement. And there she is. The Bear you have loved all your life, who has always been by your side.

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: I told you to keep her out of here today.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Someday, I will need to go back to her

closing.speaker: Father
closing.text: But you have everything you need, here

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Some things can't be changed. Some losses... we have to carry them. But that doesn't mean we stop living.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Father grabs your hand. Your companions flank you. You wait.

choices.text: Use a false core. Buy time for father to sabotage the device from within.
Pretend to use a companion's core, but switch it at the last second with a decoy.

puzzle.title: The Failsafe Deception
puzzle.instructions: Secretly rewire the device while pretending to install the core. Create a failsafe.
